rationale: Builds directly on the current adaptive row-offset int8 winner, but makes offsets earn their metadata. The best run is already near the 16MB ceiling, so this keeps the same per-row offset format and instead adds an error gate: only keep a row-offset tensor when its actual roundtrip reconstruction MSE beats plain rowwise int8 by a meaningful margin. That targets final_int8_zlib_roundtrip_exact more directly than the previous heuristic, can drop low-value offset payload on tensors that do not benefit, and leaves the hot training loop unchanged.
title: Row-Offset Error Gate
